title: by Tugba Aydan - 24 Count Long Thin Silver Birthday Candles, Metallic Cake Candle for Birthday, Party Candles
features: Silver color, 14 cm height, slim and decorative design: Provides a stylish and elegant look on any cake.
Versatile compatibility: Ideal color and size for both children's and adults' birthday parties, perfectly matches themed celebrations.
Signature of By Tugba Aydan Home Design: Candles designed with care to make your special days meaningful, aesthetic, and eye-catching.
Add color to your memories: Designed to create unforgettable moments in your celebrations, making a difference even in your photo frames.
Elevate your party atmosphere: Enhance your special day celebrations with the shining blue light, an impressive look on the cake.
description: Product Description Dazzle with the Elegance of Silver Cake Candles Elegant Design, Memorable Moments At "By Tugba Aydan Home Design," we introduce our silver-colored cake candles, designed to make every special occasion unforgettable. These thin, long candles, measuring 14 cm, add a touch of sophistication to any cake and celebration setting. Offering 24 pieces per pack, we provide ample options even for large celebrations. Uses Birthday Parties: Our candles are perfect for birthday celebrations of all age groups. Anniversaries and Celebrations: Enhance the magic of your special days with loved ones. Home Decoration: Not just for celebrations, but also for creating an elegant atmosphere at home. Why Our Cake Candles? Quality Meets Aesthetics Elegance in Silver : Each candle features a carefully selected shade of silver, matching all age cakes and themes. Thin and Tall Design : At 14 cm, our candles elegantly rise above your cake, offering a captivating look. 24-Pack Offering : Ideal for large celebrations, this pack ensures you have what you need for any event. At "By Tugba Aydan Home Design," our goal is to maintain the highest level of satisfaction for each of our customers. Our silver-colored cake candles offer not just a product, but an experience that adds value to your celebrations.
